description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive curved magazine, a wooden fixed stock, and a wooden foregrip. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The magazine is black and prominently curved, typical of rifles like the AK-47. The trigger guard and trigger are visible, with a red-toned pistol grip that stands out against the darker metal and wood components. The rifle features standard iron sights, with a front post and a rear notch. The muzzle end is fitted with a simple flash hider, and the overall design is iconic and easily recognizable in urban and military contexts.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and foregrip, black metal receiver, and a curved black magazine. It features iron sights and a flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile with clear visibility of the wooden stock and curved magazine.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the slim profile of the stock and barrel.
